meaning: n.<美>文化学(社会人类学的一个分支,研究文化现象或体系)
examples: Under such situation Chinese traditional culturology faces the centennial changes and the transformation of value.
In recent years, culturology has again become popular, and especially the study of local cultures has entered a new stage.
Linguistic culturology typifies a hermeneutics starting from language, based on text and with meaning and knowledge as focus.
